issues.message: Can't keep up! appeared 3 times in the lookback window.

evidence.quote: Can't keep up! Is the server overloaded? Running 120ms or 2400 ticks behind

issues.message: Newest backup is older than the warn threshold (7 days).
Java RSS is high relative to available memory.
12 client-only mods detected on the server.

host_environment.summary: Game server appears to run directly on the host.

verdict.headline: Tick lag during capture — review hot methods and entity pressure below

key_findings.title: High experience orb count (633)
key_findings.detail: XP orbs add entity tick cost

key_findings.title: Elevated create:super_glue (376)
key_findings.detail: Create contraptions or glue may be loaded

recommendations.title: Address severe tick lag
recommendations.detail: Profiler ran while the server was struggling. Fix sim distance, entity pressure, and heavy mods.
actions: Lower simulation distance and view distance if MSPT is high
Profile while lag is active (30–60s sample)
Pause world pregen during peak player hours

recommendations.title: Clear excess XP orbs
recommendations.detail: 633 experience orbs were present — common farm leak.
actions: Fix mob farm XP collection (hopper, vacuum, etc.)

recommendations.title: Review Create contraptions
recommendations.detail: create:super_glue count was high during capture.
actions: Inspect active Create contraptions and super glue blocks
Reduce loaded chunk count for heavy Create builds

recommendations.title: Consider player-driven lag
recommendations.detail: 6 players were online — chunk loading and player entities add cost.
actions: Check per-player loaded chunks and bases
Spread large builds across dimensions if possible

recommendations.title: Refresh this report
recommendations.detail: Capture a new profile while lagging, then run a Watchtower report.
actions: Run report from dashboard or /watchtower run

entries.title: Lag spike — MSPT 118ms · TPS 10.2
entries.narrative: MSPT hit 118ms with TPS 10.2 and 6 players online.
hints: Spark profile captured 3 min later — sable dominated Server thread

recent_incidents.summary: Lag spike during sable farm load

mod_recommendations.why: Registry entries referenced in logs are missing at runtime.
mod_recommendations.fix: Update or remove examplemod — version mismatch with world data.
fix_steps: Check examplemod version matches the pack.
Remove examplemod.jar and restart to confirm startup.
Restore from backup if world corruption is suspected.
mod_recommendations.action_detail: Try a newer examplemod build or remove until pack updates.

mod_recommendations.why: Supplementaries recipes reference items removed in the Farmers Delight update.
mod_recommendations.fix: Align Supplementaries and Farmers Delight versions from the pack changelog.
fix_steps: Update both mods to the versions pinned in the pack manifest.
Run /reload and check for supplementaries recipe warnings.

mod_recommendations.why: Sable sublevel containers appeared in recent error logs.
mod_recommendations.fix: Review sable configuration and loaded sublevels.
fix_steps: Check sable sublevel config for runaway tick containers
Reduce loaded sublevels near player bases

mod_recommendations.why: Create processing recipes failed to load after the 6.0.1 jar swap.
mod_recommendations.fix: Re-sync KubeJS recipes with Create 6.0.1 ingredient IDs.
fix_steps: Search kubejs scripts for deprecated create: recipe paths.
Update and /reload; confirm create errors drop in Mods → Log errors.
mod_recommendations.action_detail: Create 6.0.1 changed several processing recipe IDs.

mod_recommendations.why: Mekanism logged a dependency warning at startup after the jar update.
mod_recommendations.fix: Ensure Mekanism generators and tools jars match the core version.
fix_steps: Verify all Mekanism module jars are the same 10.7.9 build.
Remove duplicate older Mekanism jars from mods/.

mod_recommendations.why: KubeJS server scripts throw errors on reload.
mod_recommendations.fix: Fix script API usage for KubeJS 2001.7.x.
fix_steps: Open scripts/mekanism.js at the line cited in logs.
Replace deprecated Item.of() patterns per KubeJS 7 migration guide.

client_only_mods.removal_advice: Safe to remove from server mods/ on a dedicated host.

client_only_mods.reason: Client rendering optimization — not needed on dedicated server
client_only_mods.removal_advice: Safe to remove from server mods/.

client_only_mods.reason: Embeddium is a Sodium fork for NeoForge clients
client_only_mods.removal_advice: Safe to remove from server mods/.

client_only_mods.reason: Iris shader port for Embeddium — client-only rendering
client_only_mods.removal_advice: Safe to remove from server mods/.

client_only_mods.reason: Client entity texture features — no server gameplay effect
client_only_mods.removal_advice: Safe to remove from server mods/.

client_only_mods.reason: May be client-only depending on pack wiring
client_only_mods.removal_advice: Remove one at a time and test startup.
Safe to remove from server mods/ unless a server mod depends on it.

client_only_mods.reason: Sound physics is usually client-only but some packs wire server events
client_only_mods.removal_advice: Test startup after removal; re-add if clients desync audio.
Safe to remove from server mods/.

client_only_mods.reason: World map mod — client UI only
client_only_mods.removal_advice: Safe to remove from server mods/.

client_only_mods.reason: JourneyMap can register server plugins in some versions
client_only_mods.removal_advice: Check pack docs; many hosts keep JourneyMap server-side for waypoints.

client_only_mods.reason: JEI is a client UI mod but often kept on servers for recipe sync
client_only_mods.removal_advice: Usually safe to keep; remove only if pack author says dedicated-client.

last_backup.reason: Newest archive older than warn threshold

crash_summaries.display_label: java.lang.Error: ServerHangWatchdog detected that a single server tick took 60.00 seconds
crash_summaries.exception: java.lang.Error: ServerHangWatchdog detected that a single server tick took 60.00 seconds
crash_summaries.plain_english: The main server thread stopped responding for ~60s. Usually lag from world gen, pregen, or a heavy contraption.
fix_hints: Check for heavy world gen or Chunky pregen before the hang.
Review spark profiler output; reduce simulation distance if MSPT was high.
